1.premise: A Sudanese immigrant misreads American idioms and gender norms.
"Spilling the beans" can mean revealing secrets or fumbling a hot Latina.

2.premise: A racial slur could be a gender-neutral pronoun.

1.premise: Having one imaginary friend could be imaginary unpopularity.

lines.text: - Thank you, thank you very much.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I've got an embarrassing confession to make.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I've recently learned that spilling the beans
lines.label: setup

lines.text: does not mean fumbling a hot Latina.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I don't understand these phrases.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm from Sudan, I'm not American.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I just moved here five years ago, and as you can imagine,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I've been misgendering people left and right
lines.label: setup

lines.text: or so-called that.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Until I learn, I never have to worry about misgendering
lines.label: setup

lines.text: if I just call everybody my n***a.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Makes it a whole lot easier for me.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Also learned that in America we don't trust the government.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I mean, what kind of government shuts down?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And then the Air Force said the freezing area 51 program,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: or as I like to call it, putting the aliens on ice
lines.label: setup

lines.text: has to be the only country in the world
lines.label: setup

lines.text: where kids have imaginary friends.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But how come it's always one imaginary friend?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: To me that shows that even in their imaginations,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They're still fucking losers.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Fucked up.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Thank you very much.
lines.label: fluff
